author: freecurve
text:
in publish pending change the line to  
pending=$(qstat -g d -s p -u '\*' | tail -n+3 | awk '$5 == "qw" || $5 == "Rq" {total = total+ $8} END {print total}')

so that Rq jobs are counted as pending.

Thank you!
